case_title: AMINAH OWENS VS. MICHAEL HAMPTON et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY OWENS, AMINAH AS TO DEFENDANT HAMPTON, MICHAEL HAMPTON, ROBIN LEWIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-05-2012 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OWENS, AMINAH ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE REMARKS:THIS SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE OF A BAD ADDRESS / FEMALE OCCUPANT STATED DEFENDANT DOES NOT LIVE AT ADDRESS / LANDLORD ONLY FILED BY PLAINTIFF OWENS, AMINAH AS TO DEFENDANT HAMPTON, ROBIN LEWIS

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE REMARKS:THIS SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE OF A BAD ADDRESS / FEMALE OCCUPANT STATED DEFENDANT DOES NOT LIVE AT ADDRESS / LANDLORD ONLY FILED BY PLAINTIFF OWENS, AMINAH AS TO DEFENDANT HAMPTON, MICHAEL
TRIAL RESET TO DEC-17-2012 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF NOV-05-2012 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE BY THE SHERIFF DEPT., "SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE DEFENDANT WAS NOT FOUND/PER PLAINTIFF, DEFENDANT DOES NOT LIVE AT ADDRESS BUT IN DALY CITY". (SERVICE FEE $35.00<WAIVED>) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OWENS, AMINAH AS TO DEFENDANT HAMPTON, ROBIN LEWIS

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE BY THE SHERIFF DEPT., "SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE DEFENDANT WAS NOT FOUND/SEVERAL ATTEMPTS MADE/NO RESPONSE FROM NOTICES LEFT AT ADDRESS". (SERVICE FEE $35.00<WAIVED>) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OWENS, AMINAH AS TO DEFENDANT HAMPTON, MICHAEL

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-17-2012 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO FEB-04-2013 AT 6:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON BOTH DEFENDANTS. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-04-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR, NO PROOF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF TO RE-SCHEDULE A NEW HEARING DATE WITH THE CLERK'S OFFICE, LACK OF P.M. STAFF. (PLAINTIFF'S NUMBER LISTED WAS INVALID)
